Universal capability execution endpoint with capability-plan driven dispatch, fallback execution paths, and normalized result envelope.
Universal capability streaming endpoint. Stream-capable capabilities are proxied to streaming-compatible routes.
Capability health and operability report with inventory, runnable coverage, and dependency diagnostics.
List complete capability matrix with execution metadata and dependency hints.
Hybrid lexical + vector search over the capability ontology. Returns RRF-fused hits with provenance of which path matched.
Hybrid lexical + vector + capability-filter search over the model catalog. Use require_capabilities for hard filters and prefers_capabilities for soft boost.
Upload symbols and dependencies extracted by CLI Tree-sitter parser
Search using full-text and trigram matching for both content and symbols
Find all definitions and usages of a symbol across the codebase
Get import/export dependency graph for project or specific file
Get indexing checkpoint for incremental sync
Get file, symbol, and dependency counts with distributions
Receives parsed symbols and dependencies from CLI Tree-sitter analysis
Search symbols, content, and dependencies with semantic understanding

Get symbols for a specific file

schema.description: List organizations
Creates an ephemeral session with a short-lived token for WebSocket connection. The token is embedded in the wsUrl so credentials are not exposed in the WebSocket URL.

WebSocket endpoint for realtime bidirectional streaming. Supports OpenAI Realtime API and Google Live API. Provides bidirectional audio streaming, function calling, and interruptions. Automatically selects the best provider based on model capabilities.

model.description: Model ID or "auto" for dynamic selection

schema.description: Creates a Palabra.ai translation session with LiveKit WebRTC room credentials. The client connects directly to the LiveKit room for low-latency bidirectional audio translation.
Fast text-to-text translation via self-hosted NLLB-200. ~50ms per sentence, 200+ languages.

source_lang.description: Source language ISO 639-1 (e.g., "en"). Auto-detected if omitted.
